title: Gas Compressor and Gas Pumping Station Operators
description: Operate steam-, gas-, electric motor-, or internal combustion-engine driven compressors. Transmit, compress, or recover gases, such as butane, nitrogen, hydrogen, and natural gas.

tasks.text: Monitor meters and pressure gauges to determine consumption rate variations, temperatures, and pressures.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Respond to problems by adjusting control room equipment or instructing other personnel to adjust equipment at problem locations or in other control areas.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Record instrument readings and operational changes in operating logs.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Adjust valves and equipment to obtain specified performance.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Move controls and turn valves to start compressor engines, pumps, and auxiliary equipment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Operate power-driven pumps that transfer liquids, semi-liquids, gases, or powdered materials.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Submit daily reports on facility operations.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Take samples of gases and conduct chemical tests to determine gas quality and sulfur or moisture content, or send samples to laboratories for analysis.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Read gas meters, and maintain records of the amounts of gas received and dispensed from holders.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Turn knobs or switches to regulate pressures.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Clean, lubricate, and adjust equipment, and replace filters and gaskets, using hand tools.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Maintain each station by performing general housekeeping duties such as painting, washing, and cleaning.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Connect pipelines between pumps and containers that are being filled or emptied.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
